title: A Survey for a New Magazine
article_text: Somebody announced a new magazine for rich people. I did a survey to find the best shape for the magazine. The majority of people recommended a square shape. The budget for the magazine is small, so we must count every pound. None of the staff wanted to shoot photos in the wind. I requested an independent expert to review the blood samples. The sea is warm, but we cannot swim unless we have a block of time. The famous writer agreed to exchange his story for a free copy. We must stick to the appropriate plan because it is safe. I can recommend this magazine to anybody who likes rich content.
